required_patterns.description: Prompt must explicitly require hatching-style line treatment.
Prompt must ban soft tonal gradients that flatten the storyboard sketch look.

forbidden_patterns.description: This wording can push the model toward grayscale shading.
This wording can soften line treatment and weaken the sketch aesthetic.
This wording can introduce gradient-heavy grayscale rendering.
This wording can steer toward smudged charcoal gradients.

manual_review_triggers.description: Grayscale can be acceptable only if it still preserves the hard-edged storyboard sketch style.
manual_review_triggers.review_question: 这里提到 grayscale，是要保留纯分镜线稿语言，还是接受更明显的灰度铺调？

manual_review_triggers.description: Gray wash may be compatible or incompatible depending on how hard-edged the target look should remain.
manual_review_triggers.review_question: 这里的 gray wash 是轻微辅助层次，还是会把画面带向柔和灰面效果？

manual_review_triggers.description: Charcoal can mean either crisp dry texture or smudged tonal rendering.
manual_review_triggers.review_question: 这里的 charcoal 是要颗粒线性纹理，还是会引入大面积擦抹灰调？
